content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL: Normal volatility (Vol: 25.9%) with mixed breadth (4/8 sectors positive).

2. Which sectors are leading?
Heavy Industry and Construction & REIT lead; Heavy Industry ABOVE TREND: ASELS (1W: +9.62% | 1M: +15.07%) ABOVE TREND, VESTL (1W: +5.73% | 1M: -0.40%) RECOVERY.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Energy & Chemicals and Banking & Finance lag; Energy & Chemicals showing dispersion with TRALT (1W: -12.42% | 1M: -15.29%) BELOW TREND, Banking & Finance showing weakness with ISCTR (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -17.00%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
SISE (1W: +17.08% | 1M: +8.66%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +9.62% | 1M: +15.07%) ABOVE TREND; VESTL (1W: +5.73% | 1M: -0.40%) RECOVERY; KONTR (1W: +5.70% | 1M: -7.76%) RECOVERY; ENKAI (1W: +4.00% | 1M: -2.11%) RECOVERY.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TRALT (1W: -12.42% | 1M: -15.29%) BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -10.76% | 1M: -12.24%) BELOW TREND; GUBRF (1W: -7.39% | 1M: -7.12%) BELOW TREND; HALKB (1W: -5.35% | 1M: -16.91%) BELOW TREND; SOKM (1W: -5.20% | 1M: -23.09%) BELOW TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
Top 1W movers: SISE (1W: +17.08% | 1M: +8.66%) ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +9.62% | 1M: +15.07%) ABOVE TREND; VESTL (1W: +5.73% | 1M: -0.40%) RECOVERY; KONTR (1W: +5.70% | 1M: -7.76%) RECOVERY; ENKAI (1W: +4.00% | 1M: -2.11%) RECOVERY.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Cautious—sector 1W: -0.63% and 1M: -14.92%; prefer AKBNK (1W: +0.76% | 1M: -15.98%) RECOVERY and GARAN (1W: +1.13% | 1M: -13.47%) RECOVERY, avoid ISCTR (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -17.00%) BELOW TREND and HALKB (1W: -5.35% | 1M: -16.91%) BELOW TREND.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Positive bias in Heavy Industry: ASELS (1W: +9.62% | 1M: +15.07%) ABOVE TREND and FROTO (1W: +2.68% | 1M: -6.76%) RECOVERY, but watch TOASO (1W: -2.23% | 1M: -8.22%) BELOW TREND for sector divergence.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Mixed and vulnerable to commodity moves: TUPRS (1W: +0.74% | 1M: +19.85%) ABOVE TREND and SISE (1W: +17.08% | 1M: +8.66%) ABOVE TREND show strength, while TRALT (1W: -12.42% | 1M: -15.29%) BELOW TREND and TRMET (1W: -10.76% | 1M: -12.24%) BELOW TREND are clear weak spots.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral stance: overweight selective winners in Heavy Industry and high-quant Energy names (TUPRS, SISE, ASELS), underweight cyclical retail and weak banks; trim holdings that are BELOW TREND.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
SISE (1W: +17.08% | 1M: +8.66%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +9.62% | 1M: +15.07%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +0.74% | 1M: +19.85%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: -2.84% | 1M: -17.00%) BELOW TREND, TRALT (1W: -12.42% | 1M: -15.29%) BELOW TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Heavy Industry for leadership continuation, Energy & Chemicals for volatility and dispersion, Banking for downside risk if macro or FX headlines worsen.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 reaction to a break above the recent 1-week highs (would confirm risk-on) versus a breach of the 1-month lows (would confirm downside); key catalysts are Q1 earnings, central bank commentary on policy/FX, and oil and commodity moves.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
NEUTRAL regime: volatility normal at 25.9% with mixed breadth (4/8). Trade selectively—lean into ASELS, SISE and TUPRS for momentum and quant support, but keep banks and weak retail/energy names on the watchlist for further downside.
